name: Nanonets Document AI API
what_it_does: AI-powered document processing platform with REST API — training custom OCR models on document types, extracting structured data from invoices, receipts, IDs, and forms, with human-in-the-loop workflows, confidence scoring, and integration connectors for ERP and accounting systems.
use_cases: Training custom ML models to extract fields from domain-specific document types via API
Automating invoice processing for accounts payable with line-item extraction
Processing identity documents (passports, driver licenses) for KYC verification pipelines
Extracting data from receipts for expense management automation
Building document processing workflows with Nanonets workflow automation feature
not_for: Real-time sub-second document processing (async processing with latency)
Simple fixed-format documents (rule-based parsers like Docparser are cheaper)
Pure NLP text understanding without visual document layout
best_when: A team needs custom ML model training for specific document types without deep ML expertise, with an easy API for upload, inference, and human review workflows.
avoid_when: Document layouts are simple and consistent (use cheaper rule-based tools), or you need real-time sub-second extraction.

auth.notes: API key from Nanonets account settings. Basic auth with API key as username, empty password. Model ID required for inference requests. No OAuth2 or scopes. Webhook for prediction completion events. Python SDK available.

pricing.notes: Indian company (Bangalore/San Francisco). Founded 2016. Raised $29M. Self-service ML model training — no data science needed. Pre-built models for invoices, receipts, passports, bank statements. Workflow automation feature for multi-step processing. Strong API-first approach with good documentation.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for model management, training, prediction, and workflow. Basic auth with API key. Good documentation and Python SDK. Model ID required for inference — different models for different document types. Async processing with webhook. Confidence scores on each extracted field.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Prediction reads idempotent by prediction ID. Model reads idempotent. Training jobs are create-once. File uploads generate new prediction IDs — not idempotent by content.
known_agent_gotchas: Model ID required for every inference — models are per document type
Custom models need training data upload before inference is possible
Processing is async — implement webhook or poll prediction status
Basic auth pattern: API key as username, empty string as password
Confidence threshold for human review must be configured per model

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 and GDPR compliant. HIPAA compliant for healthcare documents. US and EU data residency. API key Basic auth. Document data may include PII — implement data retention policies. Delete prediction data after use for sensitive documents.
